reason: ADR.md covers all 14 architectural decisions required by Phase 2: stdlib-only stack (ADR-001), JSON persistence (ADR-002), ThreadPoolExecutor concurrency (ADR-003), atomic write pattern (ADR-004), circuit breaker state machine (ADR-005), TTL cache (ADR-006), single-process layering (ADR-007), hub-and-spoke for CRG cohesion (ADR-008), argparse CLI (ADR-009), single-subprocess-call-site NFR-02 (ADR-010), injectable clocks (ADR-011), frozen dataclasses (ADR-012), config.py reader (ADR-013), and single production community layout (ADR-014). Every ADR has Status, Context, Decision, Consequences, and Alternatives Considered sections; decisions cross-reference SPEC §1/§2/§3/§7/NFR-03 and SAD §2.7 budget consistently.
